title: Burger Maker
description:
Burger Maker is a puzzle game where you spin turntables to stack ingredients and assemble burgers one after another to match each customer's order.

The controls are simple — keyboard only — but as you fill more orders, the menu grows and the speed and accuracy required keeps climbing. How efficiently you can keep those burgers coming is what separates the best from the rest.

【Key Features】

• An intuitive and unique burger-making system built around turntables

• Addictive gameplay that tests your ability to handle an ever-growing menu

• Deeper content unlocked as your restaurant's reputation grows

• The ongoing challenge of chasing a high score on the way to 5 stars

Easy to pick up, endlessly deep — once you start, you won't want to stop.
Behind the simple goal of making hamburgers lies a serious puzzle that demands planning ahead and split-second decision-making.

【Streaming & Let's Play Policy】
Feel free to stream or upload gameplay footage, with or without monetization.
description_short: A puzzle game where you combine randomly falling ingredients on 10 turntables to fill customer orders. Preparing stock in advance is just as important as filling orders. New menu items are added as your rating climbs, making things increasingly hectic. Use combos and chains to reach 5 stars!
